author: IGN YouTube
text:
Apex Legends - Official Power Trip Event Trailer
Check out this trailer for the new event in Apex Legends; Power Trip. Experimental Stims have landed, and they're switching up the way you play the game. Wildcard features all new round modifiers such as higher jumps, instant mythic tier weapons, self destruction on death, infinite grenades and more! Think that is wild? Well the map will rotate between Kings Canyon, Olympus, and Broken Moon every 15 minutes in a Wildcard match. 

The power trip event begins in Apex Legends on June 2nd!

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 Is Leaving PS4, Xbox One Behind - IGN Daily Fix
In today's Daily Fix:
Activision has revealed Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4, the latest in the rebooted sub-franchise of Call of Duty. Somewhat unsurprisingly, the series is leaving the PlayStation 4 and Xbox One behind (they are 14-year-old consoles after all), although some elements of online multiplayer will remain playable for previous installments. In other news, the Steam Deck is sold out at Valve's online store, despite an immediate (and significant) price hike for the OLED models. And finally, a classic N64 game is coming Nintendo Switch Online, and its theme song might just get stuck in your head.
IGN Live 2026 is happening next weekend in Downtown Los Angeles. Looking for a free ticket? Go to live.ign.com and use code THEFIX at checkout.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Set Sail: The Art and Making of One Piece - Official Trailer
Take a look at the Official Trailer for Set Sail: The Art and Making of One Piece, a hardcover deluxe making-of companion book for the live-action adaptation of Netflix's One Piece distributed by Viz. Fans of the show will get an in-depth look at the artistry, production design, costumes, sets, and world-building behind the series. The Set Sail: The Art and Making of One Piece book hits shelves on June 23.

Join Luffy and the Straw Hat Pirates on their journey to find the fabled hidden treasure: the One Piece! This deluxe hardcover art book explores the making of seasons 1 and 2 of the hit Netflix live-action series One Piece, based on the hit manga series by Eiichiro Oda and serialized in Weekly Shonen Jump.
 
Discover how the production team brought to life the expansive story beginning in the East Blue and continuing to Drum Island. Concept art and on-set photography illustrate how unique locations such as the 153rd Branch Marine Base, Baratie, Loguetown, Little Garden, and numerous pirate ships—including the iconic Going Merry—were constructed using a mix of stunning practical sets and striking visual effects. Filled with exclusive interviews and commentary, this book describes the meticulous work that went into the creation of the costumes, prosthetics, hair and makeup, sets, stunts, and much more.

The Set Sail: The Art and Making of One Piece book is releasing on June 23.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Six: The Musical Live! - Official Trailer (2026)
Captured live at London’s Vaudeville Theatre, SIX the Musical Live! brings audiences an electrifying, one-night-only cinematic event starring the six original West End Queens, each returning to the roles that helped ignite a global phenomenon.

Seen by more than 3.5 million people worldwide, the Tony Award®-winning smash hit SIX has ruled the stage since its explosive debut, becoming one of the most successful and talked-about musicals of the last decade. Part concert, part musical, and all attitude, SIX remixes history through a high-energy pop soundtrack as the six wives of Henry VIII step out of their husband’s shadow to claim the spotlight, and their stories, on their own terms.

Written by Toby Marlow and Lucy Moss, this bold, feminist musical for the ages transforms Tudor queens into modern icons as Catherine of Aragon (Jarnéia Richard-Noel), Anne Boleyn (Millie O’Connell), Jane Seymour (Natalie Paris), Anna of Cleves (Alexia McIntosh), Katherine Howard (Aimie Atkinson), and Catherine Parr (Maiya Quansah-Breed) battle it out center stage through infectious, empowering anthems, powerhouse vocals, and razor-sharp humor. Backed by the sensational on-stage band, the Ladies in Waiting, the show delivers nonstop hits with the feel of a stadium concert and the heart of a Broadway classic.

Directed for the stage by Lucy Moss and Jamie Armitage, and for film by Liz Clare, SIX the Musical Live! captures the raw energy, wit, and joy that have made the show a must-see for theater fans, pop lovers, and anyone ready for history with a modern twist.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
NBA The Run - Official Open Beta Trailer
Watch the Open Beta Trailer for NBA The Run, an arcade 3v3 street basketball game developed by Play by Play Studios. Players will take to the court to duke it out in street basketball with over 30 NBA stars, true rollback netcode, and more. NBA The Run is launching in June 2026 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam), with an Open Beta on May 30 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam).

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Stigmatum: Official Gameplay Reveal Trailer
Get your first look at Stigmatum, a pixel-art 2.5D cyberpunk beat-'em-up with combo-based gameplay where you take control of Mateo, a falsely accused citizen who must battle corruption (solo or in two-player co-op) to get to the truth. Wishlist it on Steam if you're interested: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3736530/Stigmatum/

author: IGN YouTube
text:
7 Reasons Why the AC Black Flag Remake Could Be Amazing (And 3 Concerns...)
If there was ever a consensus on Assassin’s Creed it’s this: Black Flag is the best one. So the prospect of a remake is both exciting and scary: what if they get it wrong? Well, based on verything we know about the upcoming Black Flag Resynced, here's 7 things we love the sound of and 3 things we're dreading. From the exciting new quests that bring back Edward Kenway’s original voice and mocap actor Matt Ryan, to expanded upgrade paths for the Jackdaw (plus an in-game cat), and a seamless Caribbean world free of loading screens. Plus, the confirmed return of the Kenway's Fleet meta-game.

However, it’s not all smooth sailing: Black Flag Resynced omits a huge part of the original story and leaves out the Freedom Cry DLC, so however you slice it, it's not a complete, definitive package. But does that matter? Is the visual upgrade and gameplay overhaul worth losing the entire modern day story for? Resident Assassin's Creed superfan Jim Trinca has some thoughts.

#IGN #AssassinsCreedBlackFlagResynced #AssassinsCreed

author: IGN YouTube
text:
EA Sports UFC 6 - Official Game Modes Overview
Dive into the Game Modes in the upcoming EA Sports UFC 6. With care and attention given to immerse players in the world of UFC! The Legacy mode follows Chris Carter as he works his way up from the bottom to the main stage! Career Mode returns and is better than ever, letting you continue Chris Carter's journey, create a new fighter or play your favorite fighters instead! Hall of Legends lets you relive the iconic fights, with fights recreated through gameplay, cinematic cutscenes and actual fight footage! 

EA Sports UFC 6 is launching on June 19 for PlayStation 5 (PS5) and Xbox Series X|S.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Bungie is Ending Destiny Support... So What Happens Now? - Unlocked Clips
It’s the end of an era for one of the biggest live-service franchises in gaming history. Bungie has officially announced they are ceasing support for Destiny, leaving millions of Guardians asking the exact same question: what happens now?

#Destiny2 #Xbox #Bungie

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Call of Duty Modern Warfare 4 - Official Reveal Trailer
Check out the reveal trailer for Call of Duty Modern Warfare 4! The latest entry in the rebooted Modern Warfare series takes us to South Korea after an attack leaves the forces stationed there in disarray. Simultaneously, everyone's favourite cigar chomping madman Captain Price is on the run, following the events of Modern Warfare 3 and is seemingly on the wrong side of the conflict. With the series best in class multiplayer set to return, along with the DMZ mode introduced in Modern Warfare 2 set to be shown off June 7th, there is plenty to look forward to! 

Call of Duty Modern Warfare 4 launches on October 23rd 2026 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Nintendo Switch 2, PC (BattleNet, Steam, Xbox on PC) and Xbox Series X|S.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
UFC 6 Hands-On Preview: Big and Small Changes Add Up to a Huge Improvement
We were impressed by our first hands-on impressions of EA Sports UFC 6. The improved lighting and fighter models make it look noticeably improved, the striking is more satisfying, there are far more distinct-feeling fighters thanks to the new Flow State mechanics, and the Hall of Legends is a true treat for UFC fans looking to relive classic moments of the sport as well as learn more about some of its most influential fighters. Previewed by Mitchell Saltzman

#IGN #Gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Zangyou: Official Announcement Trailer
Get your first look at Zangyou, a disturbing psychological horror game set inside a deserted Tokyo skyscraper. In it, you must escape a hostile AI while trapped on the 32nd floor. 

Wishlist Zangyou on Steam if you're interested: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3805820/Zangyou/
